name: Apple Brown Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red apple, cored and diced
3 cups Cooked brown rice (cooked in apple juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the diced apple, chopped onions, sliced celery, seedless raisins, poultry seasoning, thyme, and ground black pepper with margarine until the vegetables are tender crisp.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients: cooked brown rice (cooked in apple juice), rice bran, toasted slivered almonds, and apple juice.
3. Use this stuffing for poultry or pork roast. For a side dish, cook until thoroughly heated.
Each serving provides:
- 247 calories
- 5.3 g. protein
- 7.4 g. fat
- 43.2 g. carbohydrate
- 5.1 g. dietary fiber
- 33 mg. sodium
- 0 mg. cholesterol
Source: "Light, Lean & Low Fat" booklet
